name: Albemarle Street
description: Luxury redevelopment in Mayfair — five storeys with lift access, multiple residential units, Revit-based BIM coordination, technical documentation, and construction support using point cloud capture.

name: Covent Garden Market
description: BIM delivery for a heritage market refurbishment — Revit modelling, multidisciplinary coordination, model auditing, drawing production, family creation, and BIM management.

name: Brewer Street
description: Mixed-use redevelopment with existing building capture, Revit model development, interior reconfiguration, heritage façade coordination, MEP coordination, and construction documentation support.

name: Harley Street Private Healthcare
description: Reception and clinical interior design — spatial planning, finishes, furniture layout, and documentation for a premium private healthcare environment.

name: Harley Street — Background Plan
description: Technical background plan and layout documentation supporting the Harley Street private healthcare fit-out.
